review_text: Super soft cotton and fits perfectly. Bought three colors already.
Good quality for the price. Slightly long in the torso but manageable.
Washes well and hasn't faded after 10 washes. Will buy more.
Gorgeous silk blend fabric. Needs careful washing. Color is stunning.
Had to size up. The material is nice but sizing is inconsistent.
Incredibly comfortable and the graphic print is fire. Love the oversized fit.
My daughter loves it. Great quality print that doesn't crack.
Amazing quality but wish it was a bit cheaper. The fabric is premium though.
Breathable linen that looks smart casual. Wrinkles easily though.
Best linen shirt I've owned. Soft from the first wear.
Hugs the body perfectly. Great for layering underneath jackets.
Good ribbed tank. Comfortable and breathable for workouts.
Stunning floral print. The zipper feels cheap though. Wore it to a wedding and got compliments.
The stitching started coming apart after two wears. Print is lovely but quality control is lacking.
Looks great in photos but the fabric feels cheap. Runs very tight around hips.
Turns heads for sure. Hard to sit in though. More of a standing-only dress.
Terrible quality for the price. Seams ripped on first wear. Very disappointed.
The drape is absolutely gorgeous. Feel like a million bucks wearing this.
Beautiful dress but the belt loop broke. Customer service replaced it quickly.
Great denim shirt dress. Versatile - dress up with heels or down with sneakers.
Wore this to a gala and felt amazing. The sequins are securely attached.
Beautiful dress. Slightly heavy but the sparkle is worth it.
Perfect fit and so comfortable. The stretch fabric is a game changer.
Great for office and weekends. Color hasn't faded after multiple washes.
Finally jeans that don't gap at the waist! Amazing fit and quality.
These jeans are incredible. The high waist is flattering and comfortable.
Great jeans but took a while to break in. Once softened they're ideal.
Beautiful drape and very comfortable. Looks expensive. Runs a bit long.
Super comfortable cargo joggers. Pockets are actually useful!
I live in these. Comfortable stretchy and look good enough for casual outings.
Love the style and comfort. Had to size down - they run large.
They look like real leather but the waistband rolls down constantly. Annoying.
Started peeling after just 3 wears. Not worth the price at all.
They look great with boots. Mine haven't peeled yet. Maybe quality varies.
Worth every penny. Keeps me warm and looks incredibly sophisticated.
The wool blend is luxurious. One of the best coats I've owned.
Lightweight but incredibly warm. Great for Delhi winters.
Very warm and well-made. Packs down well for travel. A bit puffy looking.
Timeless trench coat. Well-made and elegant. The belt is a nice touch.
The distressing is perfect - not overdone. Fits like a dream.
Goes with everything. Quality is outstanding for the price.
Lightweight and genuinely waterproof. Perfect for Mumbai rains.
Just the right size for essentials. Leather quality is impressive.
Stylish and functional. The strap is comfortable for all-day wear.
Gorgeous prints on real silk. Makes any outfit look put together.
Minimal design but maximum impact. Gets compliments everywhere.
Beautiful watch. The strap quality and face design are outstanding.
Cute earrings at a great price. The gold ones look surprisingly expensive.
Sturdy canvas great size and love the minimalist design.
Holds everything I need. Wish it had a zip pocket inside.
Soft cashmere and fits well. Great for winter mornings.
Beautiful embroidery work. Looks great over jeans or a dress.
Lightweight breathable and the pockets actually fit a phone. Bought 3 pairs.
Great athletic shorts. No chafing and they dry fast.
The faux fur looks surprisingly real. Great for a night out.
Looks gorgeous but sheds faux fur everywhere. Needs a lint roller nearby.
Adorable charm set. Great gift for friends. Some charms are a bit small.
Bought as gifts. Everyone loved them. Good quality for the price.
The fit is nice but material quality is subpar. Expected more for leather look.
Definitely a party dress. Not for everyday comfort but looks amazing.
